title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Licious - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Licious - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Licious! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Licious:
Licious is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious!
